name: Peetambari Meher Lehenga
description: A full-flared skirt in a rich mustard yellow base, adorned with an all-over floral and botanical print. The fabric is meticulously highlighted with delicate sequins and zari work, which follow the lines of the print to give it a shimmering, three-dimensional texture. A matching cropped blouse with a classic scoop neckline and mid-length sleeves. It carries the same intricate floral embroidery and sequin highlights as the skirt, creating a cohesive, high-fashion look. A solid, sheer georgette dupatta in a matching yellow shade. Its simplicity balances the busy, ornate pattern of the lehenga, draped elegantly to complete the traditional ensemble. Joyful, radiant, and traditional yet trendy. This outfit is designed for the woman who wants to stand out at a summer wedding or a lively Haldi celebration.
specifications: Fabric - Premium Satin Crepe blend (Skirt & Choli) with intricate print and sequin highlights; Soft Chiffon(Dupatta)
Color - Mustard Yellow with multi-colored floral accents (Pink, Green, and Silver)
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery/Work Details - Digital Floral Print with hand-guided sequin highlights and delicate zari border work
Product Highlight - A vibrant yellow palette that is both photogenic and festive, featuring a comfortable yet voluminous flare
Customization - Only Size and Length of Product

name: Sharvari Lehenga
description: A breathtaking, high-waist flared skirt drenched in monochromatic black sequins. The embellishments are arranged in sophisticated linear and chevron patterns, creating a shimmering 'rain' effect that elongates the silhouette and captures light with every movement. A matching cropped blouse featuring a flattering V-neckline and short sleeves. It mirrors the intricate vertical sequin work of the skirt, ensuring a seamless and regal transition from top to bottom. A sheer, lightweight black georgette or net dupatta that adds an ethereal layer. It is kept minimal with a delicate beaded or scalloped border to allow the heavy work on the lehenga to remain the focal point. Bold, glamorous, and undeniably 'after-dark.' This ensemble is designed for high-octane evening events like glamorous Receptions, Sangeet nights, or cocktail galas.
specifications: Fabric - Faux Georgette or Satin Crepe base with dense all-over Sequin and Thread embroidery (Skirt & Choli), Soft Net/Georgette (Dupatta)
Color - Jet Black (Noir) with tonal black shimmering embellishments
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery/Work Details - Intricate linear sequin embroidery with geometric chevron motifs and tonal thread work
Product Highlight - High-shine monochromatic look that offers a slimming silhouette and a modern 'Red Carpet' ethnic appeal
Customization - Only Size and Length of Product

name: Shahi Mehendi Lehenga
description: Designed as a true heirloom piece, this magnificent Emerald and Multi-color Satin Crepe Lehenga ensemble balances the weight of tradition with a vibrant, modern soul. The skirt features a supremely voluminous flare. It is intricately adorned with traditional gold Zari and multi-coloured thread embroidery, showcasing elaborate floral and paisley motifs that dance across the emerald base. A rich, solid emerald green choli with a classic square neckline and half-sleeves, providing a stately structure that allows the heavy work of the skirt to remain the centerpiece. The look is completed with a unique Two Shaded Organza Dupatta. From a sunny mustard yellow to a deep Rani pink, it adds a soft, ethereal layer to the opulent silk. This set is a perfect statement piece for grand, high-profile events like a Sangeet or a Mehendi. To complete the royal look, pair it with heavy Kundan Jhumkas and a stack of multi-coloured glass bangles as seen in the photo.
specifications: Lehenga & Choli - Satin Crepe zari embroidery (Skirt), Satin Crepe blend Fabric embroidered sleeves (Choli), Organza (Fabric)
Color - Emerald Green with pink and yellow design(Top/Skirt) / Mustard yellow and Rani pink (Dupatta)
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery/Work Details - Antique Zari Embroidery Fabric with Paisley work
Product Highlight - Striking Contrast of Emerald Green, Mustard yellow and Rani pink Shades
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product

name: Meher Lilac Lehenga
description: Heavily embellished lehenga with intricate white or silver thread work and beadings. The embroidery features a mix of striking geometric lines, chevron patterns, and delicate floral or paisley-like motifs that give it a rich, textured look. The matching cropped top features a flattering V-neckline and short sleeves. It mirrors the skirt's elegance with vertical and horizontal linear embellishments that create a flattering silhouette. The set is tied together with a sheer, lightweight dupatta in the same lavender shade, finished with a subtle, delicate white lace or scalloped border. The overall look is graceful, modern, and perfect for daytime weddings, sangeets, or festive celebrations.
specifications: Lehenga & Choli - Net with white threads embroidery (Skirt & Blouse), Chiffon (Dupatta)
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery/Work Details - White thread Embroidery with beads
Product Highlight - Beautiful Lilac shade with white beads and threadwork
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product

name: Shahi Bagh Lehenga Set
description:
Drape yourself in heritage with this magnificent Maroon and Gold Lehenga Set. Featuring a rich maroon choli with a classic neckline and a supremely voluminous, flared lehenga skirt, this set is an absolute heirloom piece. The set is crafted from luxurious heavy crepe fabric that provides a stately structure and opulent drape. The entire lehenga and choli are adorned with intricate traditional gold and multi-colored Zari and thread embroidery, featuring elaborate floral and geometric motifs. The striking navy blue border adds a dramatic finish. The look is completed with a soft net dupatta featuring delicate scattered work and a matching trim. This set is a perfect statement piece for any grand, high-profile event.

Ideal for bridal wear, wedding receptions, or major family celebrations. Pair it with layered Polki or heavy Kundan jewellery.
specifications: Dupatta - Soft Net with Border Work (Fabric)
Color - Deep Maroon with Navy Blue & Gold Accents
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery Details - Heavy Intricate Gold Zari, and Multi-color Thread Work
Product Highlight - Extreme Volume (Gher) and Opulent, Full-Body Traditional Embroidery
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product

name: Rani Haar Lehenga Set
description:
Capture the spotlight with this magnificent Fuschia Rani Pink Lehenga Set. Featuring a vibrant hand embroidered V- neckline choli and a beautifully flared A-line lehenga skirt, this set commands attention. The skirt is crafted from a luxurious woven brocade fabric that features a stunning, multicoloured, horizontal striped pattern, giving it an exceptional structure and rich drape. The silk blend choli and matching soft net dupatta provide a vibrant contrast to the heavy skirt. The look is completed with a soft net dupatta trimmed with delicate, subtle handwork border. This set is a perfect statement piece for any celebratory occasion.

Ideal for festive gatherings, Haldi, Mehendi, Sangeet, or pre-wedding functions. Pair it with an elegant Maang Tikka and Kundan jewellery.
specifications: Lehenga & Choli - Woven Brocade (Skirt), Silk blend Fabric with hand embroidered neckline (Choli), Dupatta Soft Net (Fabric)
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery/Work Details - Woven Brocade Fabric with Horizontal Patterned Stripes on Skirt; Subtle Handwork Embellishment/Beadwork on Choli and Dupatta Trim
Product Highlight - Striking Contrast of Solid Fuschia Pink and Vibrant Multicolour Brocade Skirt
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product

name: Roshni Lehenga Set
description:
Embrace vibrant elegance with this gorgeous bright orange Peplum top and lehenga set. Featuring a comfortable, flared peplum-style kurta and flared lehenga skirt, this set is crafted from a silk blend fabric that holds its shape beautifully. The look is completed with a matching organza dupatta, all subtly enhanced with delicate light golden gota work trim. It's a perfect statement piece for any festive occasion.

Ideal for Mehendi ceremonies, festivals, or celebratory dinners. Pair it with bold gold or silver jewellery.
specifications: Length of kurta - 32 inches (Approximate peplum length)
Embroidery Details - Light Golden Gota Work on Borders
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product

name: Gulabi Jhalak Lehenga Set
description:
Embrace pure exuberance with this magnificent Reddish Rani Pink Lehenga Set. Featuring a vibrant choli with an elegant V-cut back and a beautifully flared lehenga skirt, this set is crafted from luxurious Crepe fabric that provides excellent structure and drape. The choli sleeves are adorned with rich multicolored thread and mirror work, while the skirt features stunning panel-style embroidery with traditional motifs. The look is completed with a matching net dupatta trimmed with delicate border work. This set is a perfect statement piece for any celebratory occasion.

Ideal for Sangeet, destination weddings, or any festive evening event. Pair it with traditional Kundan jewellery.
specifications: Color - Reddish Rani Pink / Cranberry Pink
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery Details - Intricate Multicolor Thread and Mirror Work on Sleeves; Panel Embroidery on Skirt
Product Highlight - Luxurious Crepe Fabric and Heavily Embroidered Sleeves
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product

name: Rang-e-Resham Lehenga Set
description:
Embrace traditional artistry with this exquisite Crepe Lehenga Choli Set. Featuring a structured blouse and a dramatically flared Lehenga skirt, this set is crafted from luxurious Crepe fabric that offers a beautiful drape. The entire outfit is a canvas for intricate full Zari and thread embroidery, displaying a beautiful multicolored traditional motif. The look is completed with a bright Yellow Organza dupatta trimmed with Gota work. It's a perfect statement piece for any celebratory occasion.

Ideal for Mehendi, Sangeet, or traditional wedding events. Pair it with layered beaded necklaces or heavy Kundan jewellery.
specifications: Lehenga & Choli - Crepe with Silk Blend Lining (Fabric)
Color - Off-White/Ivory Base with Multicolored Embroidery
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Lehenga, Choli, Dupatta)
Embroidery Details - Full Zari and Thread Work with Intricate Motifs
Product Highlight - Multicolored Traditional Embroidery and Deep Back Cut-out
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product
